mapper.sql: message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, image_url, message_type, status, send_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM private_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY send_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message WHERE ((sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1})) AND status = 1
